Bus Timings

313 Bus Timetable Al Rolla Terminal to Dubai Airport Terminal 2

December 8, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Public transport in the UAE is a lifesaver, helping locals and expats navigate the bustling emirates without breaking the bank. Big news: SRTA (Sharjah’s transport folks) just launched the 313 bus route. It’s a sweet deal connecting Sharjah and Dubai, running from Al Rolla Terminal straight to Dubai Airport Terminal 2. For anyone bouncing between these cities for work, fun, or travel, this new route is a total game-changer. Makes life a whole lot easier, doesn’t it? Contents

313 Bus Timings

Knowing the 313 bus timings is very important thing for those of you who want to take this route.

As for your information, the 313 bus operates seven days a week with the first bus depart at 06.00 from Al Rolla Terminal and the last bus depart at 11.00 PM, here is the timetable of 313 bus timings from Al Rolla Terminal Sharjah.

From Al Rolla Terminal From Dubai Airport Terminal 2
06:00 07:20
06:30 07:50
07:00 08:20
07:30 08:50
08:00 09:20
08:30 09:50
09:00 10:20
09:30 10:50
10:00 11:20
10:30 11:50
11:00 12:20
11:30 12:50
12:00 13:20
12:30 13:50
13:00 14:20
13:30 14:50
14:00 15:20
14:30 15:50
15:00 16:20
15:30 16:50
16:00 17:20
16:30 17:50
17:00 18:20
17:30 18:50
18:00 19:20
18:30 19:50
19:00 20:20
19:30 20:50
20:00 21:20
20:30 21:50
21:00 22:20
21:30 22:50
22:00 23:20
22:30 23:50

This timetable ensures that passengers can plan their journeys effectively with frequent departures, particularly during peak hours.

The 313 bus route begins at Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah and ends at Dubai International Airport Terminal 2. This route is designed to serve both commuters and travelers, ensuring that passengers have access to key locations in both Sharjah and Dubai.

And here is the complete stops of 313 Bus

1.

  1. Al Jubail Bus Terminal - Another critical stop in Sharjah, providing connections to other emirates.

  2. King Faisal Street (Adnoc Station) - Convenient for those working or living near King Faisal Street.

  3. King Faisal Road, Jumbo Sony - A busy commercial area.

  4. Al Wahda, City Centre 1 - Near the popular City Centre Sharjah mall.

  5. Al Wahda Road, Subway - A strategic stop for commuters.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Stadium Metro Station 1 - Connecting to the Dubai Metro Green Line.

  2. Ministry of Information - Serving government offices.

  3. Al Nahda Metro Station 1 - Another connection to the Dubai Metro Green Line.

  4. Dubai Airport Free Zone Metro Bus Stop - Important for professionals working in the Free Zone.

  5. DAFZA - Dubai Airport Free Zone Authority.

  6. Dubai Airport Terminal 2 - Final stop, critical for travelers catching flights from Terminal 2

Other bus routes in Sharjah that you can check out include the 113 bus route, which runs from Sharjah to Rashidiya, and the 118 bus route, which also travels from Sharjah to Rashidiya.Read Also: 309 Bus Timings and Route ## Fare and Journey

The fare structure for the 313 bus route is straightforward and affordable, making it a viable option for daily commutes and occasional trips. You are only asked to pay 15 AED for all good facilities and good journey.

Traveling on the 313 bus offers a comfortable and efficient experience. The buses are equipped with modern amenities to ensure a pleasant journey such as comfortable seating, priority seating, free wi-Fi: and clean e-environment.## Journey Experience

The 313 bus from Al Rolla Terminal to Dubai Airport Terminal 2 offers a lengthy yet captivating journey through Sharjah and into Dubai.

This route provides a unique perspective of both cities, showcasing the blend of Sharjah’s cultural heritage and Dubai’s modern attractions.

The 313 bus route is an essential service for residents of Sharjah and Dubai, providing a reliable and cost-effective transportation option. And you must know 313 bus timings to make your trip easier.

By understanding the intricacies of the 313 bus route, UAE residents can make informed decisions about their daily commutes and travel plans, enhancing their overall experience with public transportation.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 8, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
